items.q: Which tv show features the character Alec Hardy?
items.explanation: Alec Hardy is associated with Broadchurch.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show I, Claudius?
items.explanation: Claudius is one of the defining characters in I, Claudius.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Detectorists?
items.explanation: Andy Stone is one of the defining characters in Detectorists.

items.q: The character Tony Stonem appears in Babylon 5.
items.explanation: Tony Stonem appears in Skins, not Babylon 5.

items.q: The character Guillaume Debailly appears in The Bureau.
items.explanation: Guillaume Debailly is a key character in The Bureau.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Will McKenzie.
items.explanation: Will McKenzie is strongly linked to The Inbetweeners.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Sartaj Singh.
items.explanation: Sartaj Singh is strongly linked to Sacred Games.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show The Twilight Zone?
items.explanation: Rod Serling is one of the defining characters in The Twilight Zone.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Happy Valley?
items.explanation: Catherine Cawood is one of the defining characters in Happy Valley.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Birgitte Nyborg.
items.explanation: Birgitte Nyborg is strongly linked to Borgen.
